heading: Why trust this LA Metro safety guide
intro: This guide is based on real experience riding the LA Metro across the tourist-relevant lines — knowing which stations feel comfortable, which times are fine, and when rideshare is the smarter choice.

items.title: Line-specific safety assessments
items.text: Metro safety varies significantly by line, station, and time of day. This guide covers the specific combinations that matter for tourists — not vague city-wide impressions.

items.title: Honest about risks without overclaiming
items.text: The LA Metro is not dangerous during the day on the main tourist lines. This guide tells you when it is fine and when a different option is smarter — not blanket fear-based advice.

items.title: Practical tips, not just warnings
items.text: Phone placement, car selection, station navigation, and fare compliance are all covered — the practical steps that make Metro travel safe and comfortable.

items.title: Covers when to use Uber instead
items.lead: The right tool for the job:
items.text: This guide tells you clearly when Metro is the right call and when Uber is safer or faster — so you can make confident decisions throughout your trip.

footer: If you want to ride the LA Metro safely and confidently as a tourist, this guide tells you exactly what to do and when.
